name: Tissington and Carsington

locations.address:
Ashbourne Enquiry Office,
Compton Road,
Ashbourne,

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Tissington. It belongs to the Derbyshire Dales Local Policing Unit. Tissington is a small village, located approximately four miles to the North of Ashbourne, in the centre of this neighbourhood. The neighbourhood includes a number of villages and hamlets, namely Fenny Bentley, Mappleton, Thorpe, Kniveton, Bradbourne, Ballidon, Parwich, Alsop en le Dale, Hopton, Brassington, Hognaston and Pikehall. It also includes the second largest man-made reservoir in the country - Carsington Water. It is the flagship of Severn Trent Water Authority's reservoirs with a bustling visitor's centre, its own sailing club and beautiful surroundings.
